vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I spent most of my afternoons exploring the local woodlands to collect rare insects.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động/sở thích cá nhân (làm một mình)
vocab.example: While most kids played football, my favorite activity was a more solitary pursuit—assembling intricate 1,000-piece puzzles.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi săn tìm đồ vật
vocab.example: My siblings and I used to organize elaborate scavenger hunts around the house, which kept us occupied for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: phương thức giải tỏa/phát huy tính sáng tạo
vocab.example: Finger painting served as a vital creative outlet for me, allowing me to express my emotions before I could even write.
Learning the violin was my primary extracurricular endeavor, and I surprisingly enjoyed the discipline of daily practice.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thông qua xúc giác (chạm, cầm nắm)
vocab.example: I was fascinated by the tactile experience of playing with modeling clay, shaping it into various mythical creatures.

vocab.meaning: thế giới giả tưởng/thế giới tưởng tượng
vocab.example: I would often retreat into a make-believe world where I was a legendary explorer discovering lost civilizations in my backyard.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng giao tiếp và tương tác xã hội
vocab.example: Engaging in board games with my cousins helped me sharpen my interpersonal skills and strategic thinking from a young age.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác ngạc nhiên và ngưỡng mộ trước thế giới
vocab.example: Staring at the stars through a toy telescope filled me with a sense of wonder that has stayed with me into adulthood.

vocab.meaning: sở thích ngồi một chỗ (ít vận động)
vocab.example: Despite being an active child, I also had a sedentary hobby of collecting and cataloging postage stamps from around the globe.
